commandsRun: pnpm --filter @cdp/service-automation-runner exec vitest run test/event-payload-filter.test.ts test/parse-event-trigger.test.ts test/reenrollment-policy.test.ts test/trigger-definition-validation.test.ts (red then green)
result.e2eSummary: Web Playwright e2e (cdp_e2e, :8788/:5174, real browser): 70 passed, 1 flaky (company-ses-config 'ses-save' button stability timing flake — recovered on Playwright retry; in an UNTOUCHED UI area, not a phase-3 surface). No UI was changed this phase (backend only), so no e2e regression.
result.notes: TEST-FIRST: wrote all 8 plan test files red, then implemented to green. DSL: TriggerNode extended with eventType + optional filter (AstNode); validateNodeFields trigger case requires eventType for kind='event' and structurally validates the optional payload filter via @cdp/segments validateAst — manual/segment_entry unchanged; the cycle/orphan/edge/one-trigger invariants are unaffected (two pre-existing node-dsl tests that used a bare kind='event' as a generic 'second trigger' were updated to kind='manual' so they still exercise the count/orphan path, not the new field gate). CORE: added EventRow + EventAutomationTriggerRow + parseEventEnrollmentTrigger (event analogue of parseEnrollmentTrigger, in-code tenant isolation, drops matchesFilter===false) + evaluateEventPayloadFilter (pure, closed-grammar, payload.* namespace, reuses resolveOperator whitelist; non-whitelisted operator or non-payload field THROWS) + DEFAULT_REENROLLMENT_POLICY='once'; decideReenrollment/buildEnrollmentInsert reused unchanged as the single 'once' guard across all three kinds. ENROLL: enrollFromEvent (mirrors enrollFromSegmentChange — reads active automations WHERE workspace_id=$1, resolves event triggers, evaluates the payload filter, inserts at start node in one workspace-scoped tx, ON CONFLICT 'once'), enrollProfileManually + enrollSegmentSnapshot (loadStartNode 404s on a cross-workspace/missing automation; snapshot uses buildResolveAudience = both dynamic+manual members, point-in-time). EXPORTS added in index.ts. WIRING: (1) PROD processor — services/processor SegmentReeval marker extended with eventType/eventPayload/eventId; runSegmentReevalInTx now fires enrollFromSegmentChange per entered/exited delta AND enrollFromEvent on the SAME open tx client. (2) DEV local-api — recomputeFeaturesAndSegments returns the eval result and fires enrollFromSegmentChange per delta on the same client (so segment-entry is now LIVE — it was exported-but-unwired before); sendProfileEvent additionally calls enrollFromEvent for the just-recorded event. (3) ENDPOINT — POST /automations/:id/enroll (enrollIntoAutomation, manage_content in routes.ts + handler map) takes exactly one of profile_id|segment_id (400 before any DB op), verifies automation/profile/segment in ctx.workspaceId (404 cross-workspace, inv.2), enrolls via the reused cores; workspace_id from ctx only (body workspace_id ignored). NO MIGRATION (event config in definition JSON; 'once' is a code default; automation_enrollments already UNIQUE(automation_id,profile_id)). BUILD-CYCLE FIX: processor now depends on @cdp/service-automation-runner (package.json + tsconfig reference), which would close a turbo build cycle (automation-runner->dispatcher->processor->automation-runner). Resolved by removing the GENUINELY-UNUSED stale @cdp/service-processor dependency from the dispatcher (verified: zero references in dispatcher src/test) — behavior-neutral; dispatcher suite stays 71/71 green. No sends emitted this phase (enrollment only). Did NOT push.
result.testSummary: All unit + integration tiers GREEN against REAL Postgres (DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/cdp). automation-runner: 27 files / 147 tests passed. processor: 9 passed + 1 skipped (LocalStack e2e) / 50 passed + 1 skipped. local-api: 41 files / 179 tests passed (cold full-suite run, no cross-file contention after namespacing the new test to 0c0d0e91). dispatcher: 12 files / 71 tests passed (regression check after removing its STALE unused @cdp/service-processor dep edge). New phase-3 tests: validateAutomationDefinition event-trigger validation (eventType required + optional payload-filter AstNode; segment_entry/manual regression guards); parseEventEnrollmentTrigger (type match, tenant isolation, filter-boolean drop, falsy-ws throw); evaluateEventPayloadFilter (=/!=/numeric/exists/and/or/not, unknown-operator + non-payload-field rejection, pure no-DB); reenrollment-policy (decideReenrollment 'once' default + 'always', ON CONFLICT structural guard, DEFAULT_REENROLLMENT_POLICY='once'); enroll-from-event integration (match + replay idempotency + non-matching no-op + payload filter + tenant isolation + draft no-enroll + segment-entry regression + cross-kind 'once'); processor-style hook integration (hook fires after event lands on same tx client, replayed event_id no double-enroll, no-match no-op); endpoint integration (single profile + segment snapshot point-in-time + idempotent re-run + cross-workspace automation/profile/segment 404 + body workspace_id ignored); endpoint unit (exactly-one-of contract 400s before any DB op + manage_content route gate + returns-promise).
